title: S.O.M X FRESH ANIMATIONS
description: Fresh Animations Compatibility Bridge Resourcepack for Story of Minecraft
body:
![S.O.M X Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a75fd920a681625b8b348afd8cac7f224f9eabd.png)
________________________________
> # Description
> _**This is a Compatibility Bridge resourcepack for Story of Minecraft and Fresh Animations.
> Obviously, you need Fresh Animations and Story of Minecraft for this to work; otherwise, it'll look kinda off.**_
_______________________________
> # Dependencies
You need these Mods for both Fresh Animations and Story of Minecraft to work properly.
_______________________________
[![Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ab15a6a316b4de910775bfeb153d15372c6106.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
_______________________________
[![STORY OF MINECRAFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f9b645ee0ef11a5e806c5e39776ba6cb50ad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-of-minecraft)
_______________________________
[![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ec6f51f6c09066853ab5cd609d239b16a2394.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
_______________________________
[![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9fe8d33f8dcc4a61abf23919d9c04871f41937.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
_______________________________
> # Recommended with FA
And if you have Fresh Animations, I recommend these in addition to it.
_**"This Resourcepack doesn't do anything to any of these".**_
_______________________________
[![FA Player Extension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f53d00741c306e230c250a2ffa815836aed1e6.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)
